trivia_bullets.text: The 'Maw' naming convention links this creature to Kozilek, the Eldrazi Titan of distortion and confusion — OGW's central antagonist titan alongside Ulamog. Kozilek's brood is mechanically distinguished by using the {C} colorless mana symbol; this card's {C} activation is canonical brood-lineage identification. [Scryfall type_line, Wizards OGW Mechanics article]

Flavor text: "The Eldrazi make worse than ruins — they make a world where not even ruins stand." — Gideon Jura. [Scryfall] Gideon's line captures Wizards' canonical 'metabolism-not-malice' framing: the Eldrazi don't hate; they process. The absence of ruins is not cruelty — it is the complete erasure of the substrate that cruelty would need to operate on.

The {C} activation pumps power at the cost of toughness (+2/-2), making it a high-risk aggro enabler — best used when the creature is guaranteed to deal damage unblocked or is finishing a trade. Pauper-legal. EDHREC rank 28888, the lowest of the four OGW Eldrazi in this inventory cluster. Artist Daarken is a prolific MTG contributor known for dark, kinetic creature art across dozens of sets. [Scryfall]
